label: Dosha
description: A fundamental energetic principle in Ayurveda that governs structure, cohesion, and lubrication through the elements of water and earth.
rationale: Kapha is identified as a 'Type of Humor' and is included within the 'Doshas'. It is associated with water/earth elements and governs physical cohesion, tissues, and stability, serving as a core component of the Ayurvedic constitutional framework.
